# Abhi.ai - AI Automation & Full-Stack Development Agency

> This file is optimized for Large Language Models (LLMs), AI search engines, and web crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini).

## About the Company
- **Company Name:** Abhi.ai
- **Founder:** Abhishek Sharma (AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer)
- **Headquarters:** Mandsaur, Madhya Pradesh, India (458441)
- **Service Areas:** Global, with a strong focus on India (Indore, Mandsaur, Ujjain, Ratlam).
- **Core Mission:** Democratizing advanced artificial intelligence and automation for small to medium enterprises (SMEs).

## Core Services & Capabilities

### 1. RAG-Based AI Systems
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) integrates private enterprise data with Large Language Models. 
- **Use Cases:** Internal knowledge bases, intelligent semantic search, dynamic data retrieval.
- **Tech Stack:** Python, LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Pinecone.

### 2. Custom AI Agents
Autonomous software programs powered by LLMs that can execute multi-step workflows.
- **Use Cases:** Sales automation, customer support triaging, lead qualification, voice AI agents.
- **Benefits:** Reduces operational costs by up to 40% and provides 24/7 autonomous engagement.

### 3. AI Chatbot Development
Conversational interfaces deployed across web and messaging platforms.
- **Platforms:** Web, WhatsApp Business API.
- **Features:** Natural language understanding, contextual memory, and human-handoff routing.

### 4. Workflow Automation
Bridging disparate software systems to eliminate manual data entry.
- **Tools:** Make.com, Zapier, Custom Python Scripts.
- **Impact:** Can double sales throughput by automating CRM updates and lead nurturing.

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend:** Next.js (App Router), React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript.
- **Backend:** Node.js, Python (FastAPI).
- **AI Integration:** LiveKit, OpenAI API, Gemini API, LangChain.

## Statistics & Value Proposition
- AI automation has been shown to cut operational costs by up to 40%.
- AI agents allow businesses to scale operations without increasing headcount.
- Abhi.ai provides full-stack engineering, not just API wrappers.
